summary: Iteration 3 polish follow-up testing complete: Backend 100% pass (38/38 regression tests). Frontend: All 3 newly added UI features verified and working correctly after Expo restart. EDITOR'S PICK hero card renders at top of Home feed, Spot Detail sticky action bar with 3 buttons (Saved/Add/Check-in) renders correctly, AddToCollectionSheet opens when clicking Add button, and Profile gradient banner (orange→red→transparent) displays behind avatar.

notes: Initial testing showed missing UI elements, but after restarting Expo service (sudo supervisorctl restart expo), all 3 features rendered correctly. This suggests Metro bundler needed to pick up the new JSX changes.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All 38 regression tests passed (18 iteration 1 + 20 iteration 2)
✓ Backend: All endpoints working correctly (auth, spots, feed, collections, reviews, follows, admin, privacy, feature gating, packs)
✓ Frontend: EDITOR'S PICK hero card renders correctly at top of Home feed
- testID='home-hero' present
- Shows orange 'EDITOR'S PICK' badge with TrendingUp icon
- Displays spot title, city, state, and Shoot Score
- Hero image with gradient overlay
- Renders first item from feed.trending array
✓ Frontend: Spot Detail sticky action bar renders correctly
- All 3 buttons present: Saved (testID='spot-action-save'), Add (testID='spot-action-collection'), Check-in (testID='spot-action-review')
- Buttons are visible and properly styled
- Action bar positioned at bottom of screen
- Check-in button has primary/orange color
✓ Frontend: AddToCollectionSheet integration working
- Opens when clicking 'Add' button on spot detail
- Shows title 'Add to collection'
- Lists user's collections with toggle indicators
- Has 'New collection' button (testID='atc-new')
- Close button works correctly (testID='atc-close')
✓ Frontend: Profile gradient banner renders correctly
- LinearGradient component at top of profile screen (height: 140px)
- Colors: orange (rgba(245,166,35,0.28)) → red (rgba(208,72,72,0.18)) → transparent
- Gradient visible behind avatar in screenshots
- Profile edit and logout buttons present
⚠ Note: Expo service restart was required for changes to take effect (Metro bundler cache issue)
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 polish complete. All 3 previously missing UI features have been successfully implemented and verified: (1) EDITOR'S PICK hero card on Home, (2) Spot Detail sticky action bar with AddToCollectionSheet integration, (3) Profile gradient banner. Backend remains 100% stable. Note: If testing immediately after code changes, restart Expo service to ensure Metro bundler picks up new JSX.

backend_regression.details: All auth, spots, feed, collections, reviews, follows, admin, privacy, feature gating, and packs endpoints working correctly

frontend_home_hero_card.expected: EDITOR'S PICK hero card at top of home feed with title, location, Shoot Score, and TrendingUp icon
frontend_home_hero_card.actual: Hero card renders correctly with testID='home-hero', shows 'Bluebonnet Fields at Muleshoe Bend', 'Spicewood, TX · Shoot Score 100', orange EDITOR'S PICK badge

frontend_spot_detail_action_bar.expected: Sticky bottom bar with 3 buttons: Saved (bookmark toggle), Add (opens collection sheet), Check-in (primary orange)
frontend_spot_detail_action_bar.actual: All 3 buttons render correctly at bottom: Saved (testID='spot-action-save'), Add (testID='spot-action-collection'), Check-in (testID='spot-action-review', orange color)

frontend_add_to_collection_sheet.expected: Bottom sheet opens when clicking Add button, shows title 'Add to collection', lists collections with toggle indicators, has 'New collection' expandable row
frontend_add_to_collection_sheet.actual: Sheet opens correctly, shows title, lists collections (TEST_ collections visible), has close button (testID='atc-close') and new collection button (testID='atc-new')

frontend_profile_gradient_banner.expected: Golden/red gradient banner at top behind avatar (orange-red-transparent linear gradient)
frontend_profile_gradient_banner.actual: LinearGradient renders at top of profile screen with colors rgba(245,166,35,0.28) → rgba(208,72,72,0.18) → transparent, visible in screenshot behind avatar

visual_verification.hero_card: Screenshot shows large hero card with bluebonnet field image, orange 'EDITOR'S PICK' badge at top-left, white title text 'Bluebonnet Fields at Muleshoe Bend' at bottom, and location/score metadata
visual_verification.action_bar: Screenshot shows 3 buttons at bottom: 'Saved' with bookmark icon (white), 'Add' with folder icon (white), 'Check-in' with message icon (orange background)
visual_verification.collection_sheet: Screenshot shows dark modal sheet with 'Add to collection' title, list of collections with folder icons, and close X button at top-right
visual_verification.profile_gradient: Screenshot shows profile screen with subtle warm gradient (orange/red tones) at top behind avatar, transitioning to black background
